uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The photo URL of the user.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

GeneratedImage.title: Generated Image
GeneratedImage.description: Information about an image generated by the AI.

id.description: Unique ID for the image record.

userId.description: The ID of the user who generated the image.

prompt.description: The text prompt used to generate the image.

aspectRatio.description: The aspect ratio of the image.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the generated image (base64 or storage link).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the image was generated.

/users/{userId}/images/{imageId}.description: Stores images generated by a specific user.
